data.text: THIRD MOON OF THIRD PLANET, THICK ATMO PLANET. BEAUTIFUL PINK FROM
SPACE, SURFACE AREA THOUGH, IS USUALLY A CYAN TO GREEN. SOMETIMES
RELATIVELY DARK THOUGH, RECOMMENDED TO LAND IN DARKER SPOTS ONLY.
INTERESTING SPIKE FOUND NEARBY THE FOOT OF A MOUNTAIN AT 316:60.
LAND FEATURES ARE OTHERWISE AVERAGE, SOMETIMES THE SURFACE IS JUST
